name: Developer Utils
summary: 一站式开发者工具箱 - 20个模块80+工具：文本处理、编码转换、格式化、时间工具、正则、加密解密、代码生成、数据转换、坐标转换、IBAN验证、ASCII艺术、Chmod计算、HMAC、AES加解密、配置转换等。A comprehensive developer toolkit with 20 modules and 80+ tools: text processing, encoding, formatting, time, regex, crypto, code generation, data conversion, coordinate converter, IBAN validator, ASCII art, chmod calculator, HMAC, AES encryption, config converter, and more.
author: ning
